name: Research → Implement → Verify
description: Three-node sequential pipeline: research the problem, implement the solution, verify correctness. Classic science/engineering workflow.

nodes.description: Research the problem domain, existing solutions, and best practices. Produce a summary of findings and a recommended approach.
nodes.prompt_template: Research the following problem and provide a concise summary of findings, existing solutions, and a recommended approach. Problem: {{input.task}}

nodes.description: Implement the solution based on research findings. Write production-quality code following project conventions.
nodes.prompt_template: Implement the solution based on the research findings. Research summary: {{parent.research.output.data.research_summary}}. Recommended approach: {{parent.research.output.data.recommended_approach}}. Task: {{input.task}}

nodes.description: Verify the implementation: run tests, check for regressions, validate against requirements. Produce a verification report.
nodes.prompt_template: Verify the implementation produced in the previous step. Implementation summary: {{parent.implement.output.data.changes_summary}}. Files changed: {{parent.implement.output.data.implementation_files}}. Verify against: {{input.task}}
